entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The primary crop being monitored for insect pest problems in Guangxi and Hainan provinces

entities.name: GUANGXI
entities.description: A province in China where pigeonpea crop monitoring was conducted

entities.name: HAINAN
entities.description: A province in China where pigeonpea crop monitoring was conducted

entities.name: CROP MONITORING
entities.description: The process of observing crops to evaluate the importance of insect pests

entities.name: MARUCA VITRATA
entities.description: A severe insect pest that attacks pigeonpea, especially determinate types

entities.name: PODFLY
entities.description: An insect pest noticed in early-maturing types of pigeonpea

entities.name: APHIDS
entities.description: An insect pest noticed in early-maturing types of pigeonpea

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: An insect pest that infests pigeonpea cultivars

entities.name: MYLABRIS SPP
entities.description: An insect of minor importance affecting pigeonpea

entities.name: EUPROCTIS SP
entities.description: An insect of minor importance affecting pigeonpea

entities.name: LAMPROSEMA SP
entities.description: An insect of minor importance affecting pigeonpea

entities.name: MEALY BUGS
entities.description: An insect pest causing non-economically important damage in Taipin, Wuming

entities.name: SEMILOOPER
entities.description: An insect pest observed on pigeonpea grown after maize in Manjiang

entities.name: EXELASTIS ATOMOSA
entities.description: An insect pest observed on pigeonpea grown after maize in Manjiang

entities.name: CLAVIGRALLA SP
entities.description: An insect pest observed on pigeonpea grown after maize in Manjiang

entities.name: OXYA
entities.description: An insect pest observed in germplasm evaluation plots in Fushan, Hainan

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A crop grown before pigeonpea in Manjiang

entities.name: PSOPHOCARPUS TETRAGONOLOBUS
entities.description: A neighboring crop also infested by Maruca vitrata

entities.name: ICP 7035
entities.description: A cultivar of pigeonpea infested with M. vitrata and H. armigera

entities.name: ICPL 87091
entities.description: A cultivar of pigeonpea infested with M. vitrata and H. armigera

entities.name: DETERMINATE TYPES
entities.description: A growth habit of pigeonpea that is more severely attacked by Maruca vitrata

entities.name: EARLY-MATURING TYPES
entities.description: A growth habit of pigeonpea where podfly and aphids were noticed

entities.name: YELLOW MOSAIC
entities.description: A viral disease that severely infected germplasm evaluation plots in Fushan, Hainan

entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC
entities.description: A viral disease that severely infected germplasm evaluation plots in Fushan, Hainan

entities.description: A location in Guangxi where pigeonpea cultivars were monitored

entities.name: TAIPIN
entities.description: A location in Wuming where mealy bugs and podfly were observed

entities.description: A location in Hainan where germplasm evaluation plots were monitored

entities.description: A growth stage of pigeonpea plants severely attacked by Maruca vitrata
